stories.title: Fix handleUpload to check analysisStore.error before setting success
acceptanceCriteria: FileDropzone.svelte handleUpload checks analysisStore.error after await analysisStore.analyze()
If analysisStore.error is set, uploadStatus = 'error' and errorMessage shows the error
If analysisStore.error is null, uploadStatus = 'success' and navigation proceeds

stories.title: Filter reoptimize transactions to latest month
acceptanceCriteria: getLatestMonth helper exported from analyzer.ts returns the latest month string from a transaction list
store.svelte.ts reoptimize filters editedTransactions to latest month before passing to optimizeFromTransactions
All-month transactions are still stored in result.transactions for display/editing

stories.title: Add minimum merchant name length guard for reverse substring matching
acceptanceCriteria: MerchantMatcher.match returns uncategorized for merchant names shorter than 2 characters
kw.includes(lower) direction only matches when lower.length >= 3 in matcher.ts
kw.includes(lower) direction only matches when lower.length >= 3 in taxonomy.ts

stories.title: Add Number.isFinite guard in XLSX parseDateToISO
acceptanceCriteria: parseDateToISO in xlsx.ts guards against Infinity and NaN via Number.isFinite before range check

stories.title: Add documentation comment for global cap over-count correction
acceptanceCriteria: reward.ts lines 265-268 have a documentation comment explaining why the over-count correction is necessary
